productName: J-HR-100BBLJ - Journeyman Hash Blackberry Lemonade Jellies (100mg THC)
description: Handcrafted sweet-tart lemonade gummies inspired by old-world confectionery, where bright fruit purée, glossy sugar, and a silky cannabis infusion come together in one irresistible chew. It features THC for a classic euphoric lift. A flavorful hybrid option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
